_doc: Mr.Long DECISION cycle 93: SVTK adopts CRLF (Windows) foundation hash convention.
rationale: All SVTK CMD workers run on Windows machines (same as LEAD). LF canonical (ab1b4eb2a5...) would require eol normalization layer across 19 workers — unnecessary overhead.
implications: INDEX.sha256 + 19 cmd.md ghi hash CRLF 4e9a6d7adc... (current state)
.gitattributes *.md eol=lf vẫn giữ nhưng workers compute hash sau git checkout CRLF
Mọi alert foundation_hash_three_way_mismatch từ LF perspective → CLOSED no-fix (platform divergence accepted)
Nếu future worker chạy trên Linux/Mac → cần dual-hash strategy (defer Phase 16+)
supersedes_decisions: cycle 61 Option A (LF canonical) — reverted by upstream CMD3 B2 + Mr.Long chốt Windows
